/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_jpl_runtime.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_jpl_runtime.dir/tests/test_jpl_runtime.c.o -o test_jpl_runtime  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shreesoftech/projects/test1/astro_packages/jpl-ephemeris-/build-calceph:/tmp/jme-calceph-root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu libjme.so -lm -Wl,-rpath-link,/tmp/jme-calceph-root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu
